title: Forest Valley
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Forest Valley''' was a [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] and [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|CSA]] garrison base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brosi]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was located near [[Talbot Ridges]], and within the sphere of influence of the [[Brosin Underground]] around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
